backend/main.mo: Defines the BlackgoldKdent actor with storage mixins and extensive type models for services, vessels, inquiries, company info, tokenomics, gift cards, exports, emails, and redemptions.
backend/users/Users.mo: Provides user state management with ID generation, creation, retrieval, and OrderedMap-backed storage utilities.
feature_evidence.json: Contains feature evidence records listing feature IDs, descriptions, related files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Lists summarized descriptions of multiple frontend files used across the application.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML template defining metadata, SEO tags, analytics, and initial asset loading for the frontend.
frontend/public/.htaccess: Apache rules enabling WebP negotiation, caching, compression, and proper MIME handling for optimized images.
frontend/public/bgkd-giftcard-system.htm: Standalone HTML page describing the BGKD Gift Card System with hero banner, styling, and informational content.
frontend/public/image-optimization-repor: Static HTML report page showing image optimization stats, features, and styled listings.
frontend/public/press-release.html: SEO‑optimized press release page announcing the BGKD crypto token launch with metadata and analytics.
frontend/README.md: High-level documentation describing the KD Platform frontend architecture and development setup.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes and wraps the app with theme provider and toaster notifications.
frontend/src/components/kd/AdminAddUserC: Card component that handles adding users via a mutation with form inputs and success/error states.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main site layout providing navigation, header, mobile menu, and routing outlet.
frontend/src/components/noc/ComplianceSh: Display card showing compliance status badges and VARA licensing info.
frontend/src/components/noc/Institutiona: Displays three institutional metric cards showing pipeline, market share, and staking accuracy with styled UI components.
frontend/src/components/noc/NOCAdminSect: Provides admin controls for adding/removing users and toggling universal launch, using hooks and UI components.
frontend/src/components/noc/UniversalLau: Shows a countdown and system status badges for the Universal Launch feature with periodic updates.
frontend/src/components/OptimizedImage.t: React component serving WebP images with fallbacks, lazy loading, and exception handling for special assets.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity and invalidates related queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity provider and hook for login, logout, and identity state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines many React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data through the actor interface.
frontend/src/hooks/useUniversalLaunchRep: Provides polling queries for treasury, OmniMesh, cycles balance, and DAO proposal status via the actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind layers and custom KD theme variables, plus utility classes and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the app, wrapping it with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders the About page with company heritage text and a values grid, loading company info when available.
frontend/src/pages/CareersPage.tsx: Displays careers information, benefits, programs, and a form for submitting career inquiries.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Provides company contact details and a contact form that submits messages to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/CryptoTokensPage.tsx: Shows tokenomics data, a launch countdown, and an investor inquiry form with validation and submission.
frontend/src/pages/FleetPage.tsx: Lists vessels with filtering by type and displays vessel details and images, loading data from the API.
frontend/src/pages/GiftCardSystemPage.ts: Implements a complex gift card management interface with authentication, canister info, connection status, querying, and logging. Provides UI for viewing, creating, and managing gift cards and user profiles.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the homepage with hero imagery, company metrics, service navigation, and fleet access. Pulls company info and displays responsive UI sections.
frontend/src/pages/KDDashboardPage.tsx: Displays the KD dashboard with authentication gating, user metrics, admin checks, and navigation. Shows cards for user counts, token contract placeholder, and network status.
frontend/src/pages/KDPlatformLandingPage: Provides a landing page for the KD token platform with branding and a button linking to the dashboard. Purely presentational with simple navigation.
frontend/src/pages/NOCPage.tsx: Implements the KD NOC interface with authentication, AI/treasury/DAO/zk-status queries, voting actions, and admin-only sections. Shows operational dashboards and protocol status panels.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Displays a services catalog with icons, descriptions, and modal details, pulling data from the services query. Includes hero section, grid layout, and industry-specific showcase sections.
frontend/src/pages/UniversalLaunchReport: React page that requires Internet Identity login and displays treasury, mesh, cycles, and DAO proposal data using custom query hooks with formatting helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS config extending theme colors, container settings, and custom KD/NOC design tokens with plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the KD.WebAI NOC app, current Universal Launch Report integration work, architecture notes, and feature requirements.
